info.name: Django Starter project
info.description:
A RESTful API backend built with Django for a notes management application. Supports user registration, authentication (session-based), note CRUD operations, password management, and permission group management.

**Authentication:** Endpoints require valid (signed) Session cookies.

**Endpoints overview:**

- **Auth:** Register, Login, Logout, Current User
    
- **Account:** Update Password, Delete Account
    
- **Notes:** Create, Read (with filtering & pagination), Update, Delete
    
- **Groups:** Create permission groups

query.description: Number of rows seen at a time.
Number of rows skiped from beginning

request.description:
Retrieves a paginated, filterable list of notes for the authenticated user. Requires Basic Authentication.
Requires user to be active.
Requires Idempotency Key.  
Returns notes and meta data for page including limit, offset, count, next offset, previous offset.

**Query Parameters:**

- `limit` (integer) — Number of results per page (e.g. `3`)
    
- `offset` (integer) — Number of results to skip from the beginning (e.g. `0`)
    
- `sort` (string) — Sort order; prefix with `-` for descending (e.g. `-title`)
    
- `title` (string, repeatable) — Filter by title keyword; multiple values are OR'd
    
- `include_archived` (integer) — Set to `1` to include archived notes

- `exact_note_id` (integer) — fetchs note with specified id

request.description:
Creates a new note for the authenticated user.
Requires Basic Authentication.
Requires user to be active.
Requires Idempotency Key.

**Request Body (JSON):**

- `title` (string, required) — Title of the note
    
- `body` (string, required) — Content/body of the note

request.description:
Updates an existing note by its ID.
Requires Basic Authentication.
Requires user to be active.
Requires Idempotency Key.

**Request Body (JSON):**

- `note_id` (integer, required) — ID of the note to update
    
- `title` (string) — New title for the note
    
- `body` (string) — New body/content for the note

Requires Basic Authentication.
Requires user to be active.
Requires Idempotency Key.

**Request Body (JSON):**

- `note_id` (integer, required) — ID of the note to delete

request.description:
Authenticates a user with email and password credentials. Returns a session token or cookie on success.

**Request Body (JSON):**

- `email` (string, required) — User's email address
    
- `password` (string, required) — User's password

request.description:
Registers a new user account.  
Requires Admin privilege.

**Request Body (JSON):**

- `email` (string, required) — Email address for the new account
    
- `password` (string, required) — Password for the new account
    
- `first_name` (string, optional) — User's first name, default user_name
    
- `last_name` (string, optional) — User's last name, default first_name
    
- `user_name` (string, optional) — User name, default email
    
- group (list, optional) — Groups which has the user, default 'Employee'

request.description:
Creates a new permission group and assigns specific permissions to it.

**Request Body (JSON):**
- `group` (string, required) — Name of the group (e.g. `Editor`)
- `permission` (array of strings, required) — List of permission codenames to assign (e.g. `["view_note", "add_note", "change_note"]`)

Returns the profile information of the currently authenticated user.
Requires Basic Authentication.

Permanently deletes the currently authenticated user's account. This action is irreversible.
Requires Basic Authentication.

Deactivates the currently authenticated user's account.
Requires Basic Authentication.
Return all groups and their permissions.
